title: ReleasePilot Configuration
description: Schema for .releasepilot.json configuration files. All fields are optional — CLI arguments always override config values.

app_name.description: Application or product name displayed at the top of generated documents. If omitted, the repository directory name is used.

audience.description: Target audience mode for the generated release notes.

format.description: Output format for generated release notes.

language.description: Output language for section headings and labels.

branch.description: Git branch to analyse. Used with date-range mode. If omitted, auto-detected or defaults to HEAD.

title.description: Custom title phrase for the release notes (e.g. 'Monthly Release Overview').

version.description: Release version label (e.g. '2.1.0'). Appended to the document title.

show_authors.description: Include commit author names in the output.

show_hashes.description: Include short commit hashes in the output.

repos.description: List of repository paths for multi-repository mode.

multi_repo_sources.description: List of remote repository sources for multi-repository mode. Each entry specifies a URL, provider, and optional label.

app_label.description: Display label for this repository in output

token.description: Authentication token for this specific source

since_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date-based commit collection. Overrides tag-based range detection.

github_token.description: GitHub personal access token for remote repository access. Can also be set via RELEASEPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

gitlab_url.description: GitLab instance base URL (e.g. https://gitlab.example.com). Can also be set via RELEASEPILOT_GITLAB_URL env var.

gitlab_token.description: GitLab personal access token for remote repository access. Can also be set via RELEASEPILOT_GITLAB_TOKEN env var.

output_dir.description: Directory for generated output files. Used by CI pipelines and the export command. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.

overwrite.description: Allow overwriting existing output files without prompting. Recommended for CI environments.

export_formats.description: List of output formats to generate. CI pipelines use this to produce multiple artifacts in one run. If omitted, only the single 'format' value is used.

ci.description: CI/CD-specific configuration. These settings only affect pipeline behavior and are ignored in interactive/local usage.

enabled.description: Enable CI mode. Disables interactive prompts, enables overwrite, and uses non-TTY-safe output.

artifact_name.description: Name for CI artifacts (e.g. GitHub Actions artifact name or GitLab CI artifact label).

fail_on_empty.description: Exit with non-zero status if no meaningful changes are found. Useful for gating release pipelines.

attach_to_release.description: Hint for CI templates to attach generated notes to a GitHub/GitLab release.
